description: Verify (adjudication) seat of the review funnel (#1260/#1177): runs AFTER the double-confirm judge, ONLY on confirmed findings — one adjudication call per finding, in practice staffed by a frontier endpoint. Rules verified (the finding's mechanism holds against the provided evidence — posted without the manual-verification marker), refuted (a stated claim does not hold — demoted to the archived tier with the demotion recorded), or uncertain (the deciding fact lies outside the provided evidence — stays confirmed WITH the marker). Deliberately tool-less (the bundle evidence handed in the prompt is the whole record; verification is scoped to what that evidence proves) and deliberately no output_schema (the contract is reason-freely-then-one-fenced-JSON-block, so reasoning-capable models keep their reasoning room).
